title: Chips Chahiye!
card_subtitle: Battle cry: ek packet mil gaya
lyrics:
[verse 1]
School khatam, hum aaye
*Dhadaam* bag tham gaye
Maa boli, khaana le lo
Hum boli, chips chahiye!

[chorus]
Chips chahiye, chips chahiye!
Crunchy crunchy chips chahiye!
Maa do na, please de na
Chips chahiye, chips chahiye!

[verse 2]
Maa kahti, pehle daal
Hum kahte, chips abhi laal
*Khat khat* fridge khulta
Packet bhi nikalta

[chorus]
Chips chahiye, chips chahiye!
Crunchy crunchy chips chahiye!
Maa do na, please de na
Chips chahiye, chips chahiye!

[ending]
Maa hansi, packet diya
Crunch crunch, neend aayi
style_prompt: Catchy children's Hindi song, full musical production with Indian instruments, ukulele, dholki, and hand claps, 124 BPM, bouncy and playful, high-energy Indian rhythm, warm clear North Indian female child vocal, native Hindi pronunciation, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand. Not Western.
cover_description: A small Indian child sitting cross-legged on a sunlit kitchen floor at golden hour, school bag flopped open beside them, holding up a single potato chip with a delighted face, smiling mom watching from a stove behind a pressure cooker
